scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev --workspace @sh-cert-converter/api" "npm run dev --workspace @sh-cert-converter/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sh-cert-converter/shared && npm run build --workspace @sh-cert-converter/api && npm run build --workspace @sh-cert-converter/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @sh-cert-converter/shared && npm run test --workspace @sh-cert-converter/api && npm run test --workspace @sh-cert-converter/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @sh-cert-converter/shared && npm run lint --workspace @sh-cert-converter/api && npm run lint --workspace @sh-cert-converter/web
